name: Sprint 13 — Routines, Signals & Trust Hardening
note: Unofficial sprint — no Jira sprint object. Scope derived from GitHub PRs merged June 23–July 20 + Jira tickets updated in same window (BH-737 through BH-1137, 446 tickets touched). Same date-range-cut pattern as Sprint 12.
goals: BrightRoutines end-to-end: proactive schedule detection, workflow automation, ownership model (BH-876 epic, 30+ sub-tasks)
BrightSignals maturation: notification preferences, unread-count consistency, Signal Catalog refactor (BH-409, BH-1131)
Longaeva PoC trust hardening: analyst grounding, disambiguation, MCP tool contract fixes, quality-rule enforcement (BH-601, BH-173)
Monitoring Agents: pipeline discovery, watchdog poller, auto-remediation loop for dbt/Databricks (BH-1036)
Skills Extension Framework for deep_agent — SSIS/SSRS diagnostics (BH-860)
PII enforcement across agent I/O — sample-row masking sweep (BH-1084/BH-1078)
Semantic View lifecycle fixes — MCP/GraphQL parity, merge confirmation (BH-624)

tickets.note: 446 unique tickets touched in window BH-737–BH-1137. Majority (235) sit in Needs Refinement — largely merged work not yet transitioned, consistent with Sprint 11/12 pattern.

points.note: Only 13 of 446 tickets carry story points (all completed). Estimation coverage remains near-zero — same gap flagged in Sprint 12.

completion.note: Ticket pct understates delivery — most work ships via PR first, ticket status lags. 499 feature/fix PRs shipped across 28 days.

themes: BrightRoutines — proactive schedule detection, workflow automation, ownership/accountability model (BH-876)
BrightSignals maturation — Signal Catalog, notification preferences, unread-count consistency, per-user severity filters (BH-409, BH-1131)
Longaeva PoC trust hardening — analyst grounding/disambiguation, MCP tool contract fixes, quality-rule enforcement (BH-601, BH-624)
Monitoring Agents — pipeline discovery, watchdog poller, auto-remediation loop, dbt/Databricks health adapters (BH-1036, BH-1037)
Skills Extension Framework — SSIS/SSRS diagnostic skills for deep_agent (BH-860)
Always-on PII enforcement — sample-row masking sweep across agent I/O boundaries (BH-1084, BH-1078)
Lineage-aware data quality — dbt/Databricks lineage adapters, medallion-tier gating (BH-1061)
Analytics dashboard — wiring mock data to live workspace resolvers (BH-835)
Visualization agent refactor — deterministic Vega-Lite spec assembly (BH-1009)
Platform reliability — Neo4j bolt pool exhaustion, catalog/MCP tool parity fixes, RBAC/auth hardening (BH-173, BH-172)
